## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it belongs in a local-first novel writing CLI.

## Verification

- [ ] `python scripts/check.py`
- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `python -m compileall src tests`
- [ ] `python -m build`

## Documentation

- [ ] README, CLI help, or docs were updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] No private manuscript text, secrets, tokens, or local workspace data are included.

## Compatibility

- [ ] Existing project JSON files remain readable.
- [ ] The change does not add cloud services, telemetry, or account requirements.

## Notes
